requirement_topic.en: Cell and Module Safety — IEC 62619 and MBS Import Conformity as Baseline for Malawi BESS Project Acceptance
requirement_topic.zh: 电芯和模组安全——IEC 62619和MBS进口合格评定作为马拉维BESS项目验收基准
requirement_topic.zht: 電芯和模組安全——IEC 62619和MBS進口合格評定作為馬拉威BESS項目驗收基準

summary.en: Malawi does not currently have a confirmed standalone mandatory BESS product safety regulation equivalent to a formal type-approval or pre-shipment certification scheme targeted specifically at stationary battery energy storage systems. The Malawi Bureau of Standards (MBS) administers import conformity assessment for regulated product categories — importers must verify whether BESS cells, modules, or complete systems are listed under MBS's current mandatory product schedule and, if so, obtain a Certificate of Conformity (CoC) from an MBS-approved body before shipment. No confirmed MBS mandatory product standard specifically for BESS has been identified from publicly accessible official sources as of the dataset date; this must be verified directly with MBS. Internationally, IEC 62619 (Safety Requirements for Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries for Use in Industrial Applications) and IEC 62133 (Safety Requirements for Portable Sealed Secondary Lithium Cells — for smaller cells) are the internationally expected safety standards for BESS cells and modules. Donor-funded BESS projects in Malawi (financed by World Bank, MCC, and bilateral donors supporting the power sector) are expected to reference IEC 62619 and IEC 62933-5-2 compliance as mandatory technical prerequisites in project specifications, consistent with international development-finance practice. Exporters must verify the current MBS regulated-product list and the applicable technical specification with MBS, MERA, and the project owner before shipment.
summary.zh: 马拉维目前尚无经确认的独立强制性BESS产品安全法规，专门针对固定式储能电池系统的型式批准或装运前认证制度。马拉维标准局（MBS）对受监管产品类别实施进口合格评定——进口商须核实BESS电芯、模组或完整系统是否列入MBS当前强制产品目录，如列入，须在出货前从MBS认可机构取得合格证书（CoC）。截至本数据集日期，尚未从公开的官方来源确认MBS发布专门针对BESS的强制产品标准；此事项须直接向MBS核实。在国际层面，IEC 62619（工业应用二次锂电芯和电池安全要求）和IEC 62133（便携式密封二次锂电芯安全要求——适用于较小电芯）是BESS电芯和模组的国际预期安全标准。马拉维捐助方资助的BESS项目（由世界银行、MCC及支持电力部门的双边捐助方资助）预计将在项目规格中将IEC 62619和IEC 62933-5-2合规作为强制技术前提，与国际开发性融资惯例一致。出口商在出货前须向MBS、MERA和项目业主核实现行MBS受监管产品清单和适用技术规格。
summary.zht: 馬拉威目前尚無經確認的獨立強制性BESS產品安全法規，專門針對固定式儲能電池系統的型式批准或裝運前認證制度。馬拉威標準局（MBS）對受監管產品類別實施進口合格評定——進口商須核實BESS電芯、模組或完整系統是否列入MBS當前強制產品目錄，如列入，須在出貨前從MBS認可機構取得合格證書（CoC）。截至本數據集日期，尚未從公開的官方來源確認MBS發布專門針對BESS的強制產品標準；此事項須直接向MBS核實。在國際層面，IEC 62619（工業應用二次鋰電芯和電池安全要求）和IEC 62133（便攜式密封二次鋰電芯安全要求——適用於較小電芯）是BESS電芯和模組的國際預期安全標準。馬拉威捐助方資助的BESS項目（由世界銀行、MCC及支持電力部門的雙邊捐助方資助）預計將在項目規格中將IEC 62619和IEC 62933-5-2合規作為強制技術前提，與國際開發性融資慣例一致。出口商在出貨前須向MBS、MERA和項目業主核實現行MBS受監管產品清單和適用技術規格。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62619:2022 — Safety Requirements for Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries for Use in Industrial Applications (internationally expected baseline for BESS cell/module safety; expected in donor-funded project specifications for Malawi)
IEC 62133-2:2017 — Safety Requirements for Portable Sealed Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries for Use in Portable Applications (applicable to smaller cell formats)
IEC 62933-5-2 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements — Electrochemical-based systems (system-level safety standard referenced in donor project specifications)

MBS (Malawi Bureau of Standards) — mandatory import conformity assessment (Certificate of Conformity) for regulated product categories; verify current mandatory product schedule for BESS applicability directly with MBS
Malawi Bureau of Standards Act (Cap. 51:02) — legislative basis for MBS product conformity requirements

summary.en: China's primary mandatory standard for BESS cells from August 2025 is GB 44240-2024 (Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries Used in Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements), which replaces the prior GB/T 36276 series as the mandatory safety baseline for large-format BESS batteries over 100 kWh. The prior voluntary standard GB/T 36276-2023 (Lithium-Ion Batteries for Electrical Energy Storage) provides the technical framework for cells, modules, and battery clusters used in EES. IEC 62133 is harmonised to some degree with Chinese standards for smaller portable cells but the large-format stationary BESS context is governed by GB 44240. These Chinese standards are not accepted as equivalents to IEC 62619 in MBS import conformity assessment, MERA project review, or donor-funded project technical specifications in Malawi. Exporters must obtain IEC 62619 type-test evidence from an ILAC-accredited laboratory in addition to any Chinese GB compliance documentation.
summary.zh: 自2025年8月起，中国BESS电芯的主要强制性标准为GB 44240-2024（电化学储能系统用二次锂电池安全要求），取代原GB/T 36276系列，成为100 kWh以上大型BESS电池的强制性安全基准。此前的自愿性标准GB/T 36276-2023（电化学储能用锂离子电池）为EES中使用的电芯、模组和电池簇提供技术框架。IEC 62133在一定程度上与中国标准协调，适用于较小便携式电芯，但大型固定式BESS适用GB 44240。上述中国标准不被MBS进口合格评定、MERA项目审查或马拉维捐助方资助项目技术规格接受为IEC 62619的等效依据。出口商除中国GB合规文件外，还须从ILAC认可实验室取得IEC 62619型式试验证据。
summary.zht: 自2025年8月起，中國BESS電芯的主要強制性標準為GB 44240-2024（電化學儲能系統用二次鋰電池安全要求），取代原GB/T 36276系列，成為100 kWh以上大型BESS電池的強制性安全基準。此前的自願性標準GB/T 36276-2023（電化學儲能用鋰離子電池）為EES中使用的電芯、模組和電池簇提供技術框架。IEC 62133在一定程度上與中國標準協調，適用於較小便攜式電芯，但大型固定式BESS適用GB 44240。上述中國標準不被MBS進口合格評定、MERA項目審查或馬拉威捐助方資助項目技術規格接受為IEC 62619的等效依據。出口商除中國GB合規文件外，還須從ILAC認可實驗室取得IEC 62619型式試驗證據。

standards_or_laws: GB 44240-2024 — 电化学储能系统用二次锂电池安全要求 (Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries Used in Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements; mandatory, effective August 1, 2025)
GB/T 36276-2023 — 电力储能用锂离子电池 (Lithium-Ion Batteries for Electrical Energy Storage; voluntary, effective July 1, 2024)

gap.en: Critical gap: Malawi donor-funded BESS projects and MERA technical review reference IEC 62619 as the expected safety evidence for BESS cells and modules. MBS import conformity may impose a mandatory CoC obligation if BESS products are listed under MBS's regulated product schedule — this has not been confirmed and must be verified. Chinese GB 44240-2024 and GB/T 36276-2023 are not harmonised with IEC 62619 and are not accepted as substitutes in project technical specifications or MBS import review. Exporters should: (a) verify directly with MBS whether BESS cells, modules, or systems are listed under the current MBS mandatory product schedule and whether a pre-shipment CoC is required; (b) obtain IEC 62619 type-test certificates from an ILAC-accredited laboratory for cells and modules supplied to Malawi BESS projects; (c) confirm with the project owner and any donor/lender technical adviser the applicable IEC 62619 edition and any additional IEC 62933-5-2 system-level evidence requirements; (d) note that MBS may accept certificates from regional conformity bodies or ILAC-recognised international laboratories — confirm acceptable conformity assessment routes with MBS before appointing a test laboratory.
gap.zh: 关键差距：马拉维捐助方资助的BESS项目和MERA技术审查将IEC 62619作为BESS电芯和模组的预期安全证据。若BESS产品列入MBS受监管产品目录，MBS进口合格评定可能规定强制CoC义务——此事项尚未确认，须向MBS核实。中国GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023未与IEC 62619协调，不被项目技术规格或MBS进口审查接受为替代依据。出口商应：（a）直接向MBS核实BESS电芯、模组或系统是否列入当前MBS强制产品目录，以及是否需要装运前CoC；（b）从ILAC认可实验室取得供应至马拉维BESS项目的电芯和模组的IEC 62619型式试验证书；（c）与项目业主及任何捐助方/贷款机构技术顾问确认适用的IEC 62619版本及任何额外的IEC 62933-5-2系统级证据要求；（d）注意MBS可能接受来自区域合格评定机构或ILAC认可国际实验室的证书——在委托测试实验室前向MBS确认可接受的合格评定途径。
gap.zht: 關鍵差距：馬拉威捐助方資助的BESS項目和MERA技術審查將IEC 62619作為BESS電芯和模組的預期安全證據。若BESS產品列入MBS受監管產品目錄，MBS進口合格評定可能規定強制CoC義務——此事項尚未確認，須向MBS核實。中國GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023未與IEC 62619協調，不被項目技術規格或MBS進口審查接受為替代依據。出口商應：（a）直接向MBS核實BESS電芯、模組或系統是否列入當前MBS強制產品目錄，以及是否需要裝運前CoC；（b）從ILAC認可實驗室取得供應至馬拉威BESS項目的電芯和模組的IEC 62619型式試驗證書；（c）與項目業主及任何捐助方/貸款機構技術顧問確認適用的IEC 62619版本及任何額外的IEC 62933-5-2系統級證據要求；（d）注意MBS可能接受來自區域合格評定機構或ILAC認可國際實驗室的證書——在委託測試實驗室前向MBS確認可接受的合格評定途徑。

mandatory_status.target: Potentially mandatory via MBS import conformity assessment if BESS is listed under MBS mandatory product schedule — must verify directly with MBS; IEC 62619 is mandatory in practice where MERA or donor/lender project specifications require it
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 44240-2024 is a mandatory national standard (GB designation) for lithium BESS cells over 100 kWh, effective August 1, 2025; GB/T 36276-2023 is voluntary

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] No confirmed standalone mandatory BESS product safety regulation has been identified for Malawi as of the dataset date; however, IEC 62619 is the internationally expected technical baseline for BESS cell and module safety in donor-funded project specifications and MERA technical review in Malawi. MBS import conformity assessment may impose a mandatory Certificate of Conformity obligation — verify directly with MBS before shipment. Chinese GB 44240-2024 and GB/T 36276-2023 certification alone is not sufficient for Malawi donor project acceptance or MERA technical review. Obtain IEC 62619 type-test evidence from an ILAC-accredited laboratory and confirm all applicable evidence requirements with MBS, MERA, the project owner, and any appointed donor/lender technical adviser before equipment procurement is finalised.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 截至本数据集日期，马拉维尚无经确认的独立强制性BESS产品安全法规；然而，IEC 62619是马拉维捐助方资助项目规格和MERA技术审查中BESS电芯和模组安全的国际预期技术基准。MBS进口合格评定可能规定强制合格证书义务——出货前须直接向MBS核实。仅持有中国GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023认证不足以满足马拉维捐助方项目验收或MERA技术审查要求。在设备采购最终确定前，从ILAC认可实验室取得IEC 62619型式试验证据，并向MBS、MERA、项目业主及任何指定的捐助方/贷款机构技术顾问确认所有适用证据要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 截至本數據集日期，馬拉威尚無經確認的獨立強制性BESS產品安全法規；然而，IEC 62619是馬拉威捐助方資助項目規格和MERA技術審查中BESS電芯和模組安全的國際預期技術基準。MBS進口合格評定可能規定強制合格證書義務——出貨前須直接向MBS核實。僅持有中國GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023認證不足以滿足馬拉威捐助方項目驗收或MERA技術審查要求。在設備採購最終確定前，從ILAC認可實驗室取得IEC 62619型式試驗證據，並向MBS、MERA、項目業主及任何指定的捐助方/貸款機構技術顧問確認所有適用證據要求。
